specialtiesKey: Boat Surveying & Inspection,Diving & Underwater Services,Marine AC & Climate Control,Marine Plumbing & Sanitation

content.tagline: Keeping Your Vessel Running All Season Long
content.about:
Welcome to Ben's Boatworks, a full-service marine facility based in Annapolis, MD, dedicated to keeping your vessel in peak operating condition throughout every season. We specialize in a comprehensive range of marine services — from detailed boat surveying and inspection to diving and underwater work, marine AC and climate control, and marine plumbing and sanitation. Whether you're a weekend cruiser or a liveaboard, we're here to make sure your boat is safe, comfortable, and ready to go.

At Ben's Boatworks, we take pride in offering hands-on, specialized expertise across every system on your vessel. Our boat surveying and inspection services give you a thorough, honest look at your boat's condition — ideal for pre-purchase decisions or insurance requirements. Our diving and underwater services handle hull inspections, prop work, and bottom cleaning without hauling out. We keep cabins and engine rooms comfortable with marine AC and climate control installs and repairs, and we handle all aspects of marine plumbing and sanitation, from through-hulls to holding tanks, so your systems stay clean and compliant.

We serve boat owners across South Florida and the surrounding coastal communities, covering a wide service area within 60 miles of Annapolis, MD. Our commitment is straightforward — show up, do the work right, and treat your boat like it matters. We've built our reputation one satisfied customer at a time, and we're grateful for every vessel we get to work on.
content.seoTitle: Ben's Boatworks | Boat Surveying & Inspection Annapolis, MD
content.seoDescription: Ben's Boatworks in Annapolis, MD offers boat surveying, marine AC, diving services & marine plumbing. Serving South Florida. Call today!

serviceDescriptions.Boat Surveying & Inspection: A thorough boat survey covers structural integrity, mechanical systems, electrical components, and safety equipment to give you a clear picture of your vessel's condition. Whether you need a pre-purchase survey, insurance survey, or condition-and-value report, a proper inspection can save you from costly surprises down the road.
serviceDescriptions.Diving & Underwater Services: Underwater diving services allow for hull inspections, propeller checks, zinc replacement, line and debris removal, and bottom cleaning without the time and expense of a haul-out. Regular underwater maintenance keeps your running gear in good shape and helps catch potential issues before they become serious problems.
serviceDescriptions.Marine AC & Climate Control: Marine air conditioning and climate control systems require specialized knowledge to install, service, and repair correctly in the demanding marine environment. From raw water cooling systems to reverse-cycle units and refrigerant recharging, keeping your onboard HVAC running efficiently makes a big difference in comfort and vessel longevity.
serviceDescriptions.Marine Plumbing & Sanitation: Marine plumbing and sanitation work covers everything from through-hull fittings and seacocks to holding tanks, marine heads, macerators, and Y-valves. Proper installation and maintenance of these systems is essential for both vessel safety and compliance with marine sanitation regulations.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Ben's Boatworks is based in Annapolis, MD and provides mobile marine services throughout South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Pre-purchase boat survey and full vessel condition inspection
Hull cleaning and zinc replacement via professional diving services
Marine AC system installation and refrigerant recharge on cruisers
Holding tank and marine head repair for sanitation compliance
Underwater propeller inspection and debris removal without haul-out
Through-hull fitting and seacock replacement for aging vessels
Insurance survey and condition-and-value report for documented boats
